_comment: Country centroids (ISO-3166 alpha-2 → [lat, lon]) for the academic globe. Populi's /campuses record supplies each campus's country/state/primary LIVE, so campuses are no longer hand-curated — only country→coordinates live here. Multiple campuses in one country are spread around the centroid by the aggregator. Add a country here if a new campus's ISO code isn't listed. `campusOverrides` lets you pin a specific campus to exact city coords if country-level precision isn't enough.

campusOverrides._note: Optional per-campus exact coords: "<campus_id>": [lat, lon]. Overrides the country centroid for that campus.
